name: agentic-coding-fitness

owner.name: Agentic Coding Fitness @ Rust Tech Bar

description: Learn-by-doing skills that recap the Agentic Coding Fitness course: LLM APIs, tool use, agent loops, MCP, RAG, multi-agent systems, knowledge-graph memory, and production GraphRAG with evaluation.

plugins.name: agentic-coding-fitness
plugins.description: 9 concept skills that teach, demo, and run guided labs for everything taught in class: talking to LLMs, tool use, the agent loop, MCP & skills, RAG, multi-agent patterns, agent memory with Neo4j, production GraphRAG with evaluation (RAGAS), and choosing models/frameworks.
